subject: VPN not connecting — very long email chain below
description:
Hi IT team, I can't connect to the VPN from home since this morning. I get an error 'Connection timed out — unable to reach gateway'. I've tried restarting the client and my laptop. My internet is working fine otherwise. I need VPN to access the trade reconciliation system for end-of-day processing.

subject: Screenshot of error — see below
description:
Getting an error on the Bloomberg terminal. Here is the screenshot:

data:image/png;base64,

The error says 'License validation failed — contact administrator'. This started after lunch. Other traders on the floor can access Bloomberg fine.

subject: URGENT — printer issue
description:
THE PRINTER ON THE 5TH FLOOR IS NOT WORKING!!!

I tried printing from Word and Excel — both just queue up and nothing comes out.

Model: HP LaserJet Pro MFP M428fdw
Location: 5th floor, near conference room B
Status light: blinking amber

Please fix ASAP, we have client presentations to print.

subject: Phone call — garbled transcription
description:
[Transcribed from phone call, 2:15 PM — LOW CONFIDENCE]

Caller: Yeah so um... [inaudible] ...the thing with the... [background noise] ...database? Or maybe it's the... [inaudible] ...when I try to [static] ...access the... [inaudible] ...SharePoint? No wait, OneDrive. Yeah, OneDrive. The files are... [long pause] ...they're not syncing. Like I put a file in there yesterday and my colleague [inaudible] ...can't see it. It's the... [inaudible] ...the shared folder for the... [coughing] ...compliance audit files. We need those by... [inaudible] ...Thursday? Yeah Thursday. [background noise] ...is anybody... [inaudible] ...hello? Are you still there? [call quality degraded] ...OK so yeah the OneDrive thing. Can someone... [static] ...look at it? My name is... [inaudible] ...uh, Peterson. Mark Peterson. Compliance team. [call ended]

subject: 🚨🔥💻 HELPPP 😱😱😱
description:
💻 my laptop 💀💀💀 it keeps 🔄 restarting 🔄 every few minutes ⏰
i was just working on the 📊 quarterly report 📈 and BOOM 💥
blue screen 🟦 with some error ❌ about memory 🧠
this has happened like 5️⃣ times today already 😤😤😤
im on a Dell Latitude 🖥️ and i think its about 3️⃣ years old 📅
can someone PLEASE 🙏🙏🙏 look at this before i lose all my work ��
im on the 2️⃣nd floor near the elevator 🛗

☎️ call me at ext 4521 📞

subject: RE: RE: RE: FW: RE: FW: FW: RE: RE: FW: Original: Outlook sync issue
description:
Adding IT to this thread.

--- Forwarded by jennifer.mills@contoso.com on March 18, 2026 ---
From: Robert Kim <robert.kim@contoso.com>
To: Jennifer Mills <jennifer.mills@contoso.com>
Subject: RE: RE: RE: FW: RE: FW: FW: RE: RE: FW: Original: Outlook sync issue

Jennifer, this is still happening for me too. My Outlook calendar shows duplicates of every meeting since March 10. I've tried removing and re-adding my account but it just re-syncs the duplicates. On Outlook desktop (Version 2402) and also seeing it on my phone. Other people in the Singapore office may have this issue too based on what I heard at lunch.

--- Original message from alan.wright@contoso.com on March 10, 2026 ---
Has anyone else noticed Outlook calendar duplicating events? Started this morning after the Exchange maintenance window.

--- Reply from sarah.patel@contoso.com ---
Yes! Same here. Super annoying.

--- Reply from jennifer.mills@contoso.com ---
Same. Adding IT.

subject: Wi-Fi    issue     in     London     office
description:
Hi     IT    team,


    The     Wi-Fi     on     the     3rd     floor     of     the     London     office     has     been     dropping     out     every     10     minutes     since     this     morning.



    About     15     people     are     affected.     We're     all     switching     to     the     guest     network     as     a     workaround     but     it's     much     slower.



    Access     point:     AP-LDN-3F-04


    Thanks,
    Robert

subject: Acceso a SAP — no funciona desde esta mañana
description:
Buenos días equipo de IT,

No puedo acceder a SAP desde esta mañana. El sistema me da un error de autenticación cuando intento iniciar sesión. Necesito acceso urgente para procesar las transacciones de cierre de mes.

Sorry, switching to English — I'm in the NYC office but my system language is set to Spanish. SAP is giving me authentication errors since 8 AM. Error code: AUTH-4012. I've been able to log into SAP from my colleague's machine so it seems to be specific to my profile or my laptop. Running Windows 11, SAP GUI 8.00 patch level 4. Need this resolved today for month-end close.

Gracias / Thanks,
Maria Gonzalez

subject: http://malicious-site.example.com/click-here http://spam.example.com/free-stuff https://phishing.example.com/login?redirect=evil
description:
Check out these links:
http://malicious-site.example.com/download-toolbar
http://free-software.example.com/crack
http://spam.example.com/earn-money-fast

But seriously — I got this in my email and I think it might be a phishing attempt. The email was from 'IT-Department@contoso-support.xyz' (note the .xyz domain) and asked me to verify my credentials by clicking a link. The email had the Contoso logo and looked official. I did NOT click any links. Forwarding to you for review. The email header shows it came from IP 185.234.72.19.

Here are more suspicious URLs from the email:
https://contoso-verify.phishing-site.example.com/secure/login
https://password-reset.example.com/contoso?user=me
http://legitimate-looking.example.com/contoso-internal/update

subject: Database access request
description:
I need access to the following databases:

```
Server: sql-prod-eastus2.database.windows.net
Database: ClientPortfolio_Prod
Role: db_datareader
Justification: Need read access for quarterly compliance reporting
```

Manager approval: David Liu (attached email confirmation)

Also need access to:
```json
{
  "server": "sql-analytics-eastus2.database.windows.net",
  "database": "MarketData_Warehouse",
  "role": "db_datareader",
  "justification": "Cross-reference client portfolio data with market trends"
}
```

Timeline: need this by end of week. Previous ticket for similar access: INC-3201.

description:
Account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue account issue.

Sorry, my keyboard got stuck. Actual issue: I can't log into my Entra ID account. Getting error AADSTS50076 after the password prompt. Started about an hour ago. I can log into my local laptop fine but any cloud app (Teams, SharePoint, Outlook web) gives this error. I'm on the London office network.

subject: Laptop request — see attached form (Note: SSN and personal info in body)
description:
Hi IT,

New hire starting next week. Here are their details for provisioning:

Name: Alexandra Rivera
Employee ID: EMP-78234
Department: Data Science
Start Date: March 25, 2026
Manager: Dr. Yuki Tanaka

Equipment needed:
- MacBook Pro M4 16-inch, 32GB RAM
- Standard software image + Python/Jupyter
- Azure ML workspace access
- Building 3 badge access

Note: I accidentally included her SSN (XXX-XX-XXXX) and personal address in the first version of this ticket. I've redacted them above. Please make sure the original submission is purged from your ticketing system logs.

Thanks,
Yuki

subject: Fichier non accessible / File not accessible
description:
Bonjour,

Je n'arrive pas à accéder au fichier partagé sur le serveur de fichiers legacy. Le chemin est \\fs-legacy-lon\shared\finance\Q1-2026\.

J'obtiens l'erreur 'Access Denied' quand j'essaie d'ouvrir le dossier.

I need access to the legacy file share at \\fs-legacy-lon\shared\finance\Q1-2026\. Getting 'Access Denied'. I had access last quarter — not sure what changed. My team (London Finance) needs these files for the quarterly review next week.

Merci / Thanks,
Philippe Durand

subject: Backup restore request     with   weird   characters
description:
We need to restore a backup of the ClientReports SharePoint site from March 10, 2026. A user accidentally deleted the entire 'Q4-2025 Final Reports' document library containing approximately 200 files.

Site URL: https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/ClientReports
Library: Q4-2025 Final Reports
Deletion timestamp: approximately 2026-03-17 at 16:30 UTC
Deleted by: jamie.collins@contoso.com (accidental)

We've checked the SharePoint recycle bin — the files aren't there (second-stage recycle bin was emptied). Need an admin-level restore from backup.

This is needed before the client audit on March 22.
